Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; Sanctions Req.
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff Trade Creditors Association, Inc.'s Motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
